TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Bonbon,Kn-bung_梵梵(英士)部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mwani qalang ro cyan te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Bonbon ga, te tyugan qalang maki mnibu,knbawiq nya ga aki magan kbhul meta, nyux maki qszyap na qalang Kbanun, misuw qani ga, nyux mqumah ramat ro alan naha mcisal squliq, nwahan naha mema ulay ru mhkangi rgyax, kruma ga musa naha halan m'abi te kint'an . cinllwan na qalang Bonbon qani hiya ga, pucing nya ga son naha Kn-bung, imi qani hiya ga pzyux balay qsinux maha ma, babaw nya lga, iyugun naha lalu nya, si soy maha bonbon la, cyux maki cyugan pinqiyon na cinllwan Bonbon qani hiya, te qutux ga, minkahul iyik na rhiyal ma ga, mhtux qsya nya ga, baq maki qutux hngiyang,te sazing ga, ryax na kinlhangan na Gipun ga, cinlalu naha ma. te cyugan ga, mlaka hzing ga, pali nya qpiray ga baq maki qutux hngiyang maha ma, ana maha kya ga binah qalang squliq ga siyan naha son naha kmal Bonbon ru qalang Bonbon squliq naha ga siyon naha kmal Kn-bong, mha ni pqutay naha cyux inu qalang su ini ga knahul su inu, baq kmal Kn-bung naha ay! Pinsbkan -Gogan -Qwilan ,Gogan ,Saruc ,Balung ,Kulu' ,Kbanun ,智腦(cinaw),東壘(turuy)- kn-bong -Bonbon tayal qa nyan qalang Bonbon,Kn-bung mwani 人口概況 qalang Bonbon squliq naha ga, aki cyugan kbhul miman squliq nya, aki ptnaq suqliq naha ki qalang Kbanun, sraral qani hiya ga maki payat ini ptnaq qalang mnwah msqun te sani lro mica ga ng_yut maki qutux qalang la. misuw qani lga tyaba qawas kwara nyux maki qalang Bonbon qani la, senin naha ga wal mtiyaw ro wal mqwas hogan kwara la, mica ga ungat hazi senin ru mrkyas kaki qalang Bonbon, babaw nya lga ng_yut ungat squliq musa mqumah la. misuw qani qalang Bonbon ga, maki saying kkyokay, qutux ga Tensinkyo, ro te saying ga Cyorokay, nanu kwara nqu snnyahan nqu Tayal ga, mtnaq nqu i snhyun nha, ana ga skura squ qalang Tayal maha, snhyan qu i Tayal qani ga, kahul squ inlungan naha, aki smru nqu inlungan, ro skura nqu i qlhan naha, pisan cqani ga, aki maki nqu i anzin nqu i inblaq nqu qnxan nqu qyanux nqu Tayal. qalang Bonbon qani hiya ga,misuw qani ga nyux naha pmiyon ga, tmana ini ga tbihi ro nexi, misuw qani lga nyux i alan cisal kahat la, cingay balay squliq nwahan sqani mcisal ulay ru mhkangi tuqiy na sraral, mica ga ng_yut mhtux shobay ini ga tbesun nniqun ga. . rryaniq qalang 部落交通 kahul Giran skura Mnibu, glux te pitu cya seng si shouyu musa , shoyu musa, akay qutux tmucing, ro musa su ktalan kya qutux bniru qalang Bonbon, ini bsyaq lga tehok su qalang Bonbon lga si . 1.Hnkiyan Hnkiyan ryaniq qnni ga,ryaniq Ipun cyunga qani, haring Toyeng mnwah ski qalang Bonbon (Hirang seng Sanse)qani ga, klangan Ipun ga, ryaniq qani ga knblay Ipun cyunga, senin Tayal cyunga ga, mwah mciriq naha ki kensat na Ipun, mehong nya lga, hetay na Ipun nwah mingat rgyax Bonbon qani, aki smoya qapun sqa knbawiq qutux seng mpitu kbhul meta rgayx qani, pciriq naha ki senin Tayal ru piyux wal mnuqil hetay ni Ipun ru senin Tayal, qani ga si say maha wa ta pungan ta iyaw na rgyax Bonbon. haring qalang Bonbon musa ulay qani ga,aki mpux zikang calay, tehok qa ulay na Bonbon lga, maki lingay nya baqun ktayux msyakin na rgyax ru cingay balay patas cyux maki rsnat nya, blaq ktalan ru cingay squliq knahul theyaq mnwah sqani smoya ktayux rsnat qani.maki uzi kkman na mhebung cyux mtrngil rsnat qasa ru naha kmal maha yan hazi knblay na qba Utux. 2.芃芃溫泉 以下為Tomi Pasang 訪談內容: skayal cikay yaw na pinnuya su tqenux cyunga? son nanu kmayal la, cyunga ga kmut qhoniq ro pugan na kikay ro mica qa baqun muya iyu la, iyu na stake, ro haring knwan pinnuya cimu tqenux? bsyaq la, aki pisa kawas la, aki zyozyu neng malax ta la, aki tgaring miman kawas hayi la haw ga? muya ta stake ga? aki garing maha kya hayi la, ro son su cimu maha nanu pnuya? pugan kikay ro mica qa syan iyu nya la, mica qa mwah tqenux nya laga, mqwalax ga wahan tmakuy qa balung ga, ro wahan cqrux loyi, ro mica qa cingun na qhoniq qa balung, mica qa hbku stake nya, ro pisa llamu wal cimu pnnuya tqenux qaca? pisa si ta say nanu wa ta qmiyun yogise ro nanu la? qhoniq ga ini si kmiyay qabax ga, ktalan qa kmiyan su stake ga qaca qa tquyun ro tquyun laro heran loyi, ro pugan loyi mica kmiyan stake la, mica kmiyan iyu lga, iyu nya, ro hlabang roq wal cimu (pinnuya)? ini hlabang, cimang… ro cya maki inu roq ca? theyaq cya maki rgyax, cyan maki lalu ku? rgayx ca? Cqyus lalu nya, ro qabax cquliq musa? ini ptnaq cquliq ga, maki kya qa nuluw ni mlikuy myan ga, mica qaca halan naha maquy, ro mica halan kmuya, iyat qabax qalang ay, han, ima roq ca? iyat roq ni cquliq qaca, roq na rincyok qaca, ro ima nya tqbaq cimu muya? kahat qa psbaq cami ga, kahat qa mwah smes iyu, ro mica kbaqun myan maha son nanu musa muya ga, ini ta kbaqi uyi qenu qhoniq uyi haw, ro pnuya su tqenux ca nya maki nanu 技巧(kinbaqan) nya ku? uka haw, si pugiy laro, si kmiyay lga, uya pquhan ro, mica kmiyan la, ro blaq nerang nya? maki kblaq uyi, maki mqucih uyi, uya hopa pila cyunga uyi, maki qa mquci iyu nya ga, ini kpiyux mwah uyi, blaq iyu nya ga, mica qa piyux mwah uyi ga, cwa cimu baq pnnuya tqenux? maki qa psbaq qa cami pungan myan ga, maki pungan mu cquliq ro mica qa baq cami muya, ga iyat ga? iyat ta pungan ta ke hogal qsux uyi haw, hogal qsux muya ga, Tayal qsux muya qa hogal ga, ro pungan myan maha cyan muya stake, mica qa baq cami muya uyi la, ro pnnuya qa tqenux moyay ku? moyay haw, tkuyun qhoniq ro hheran ro pugan ro muya kneril ga, panga iyu musa muyax, garing muyax panga iyu ro wahan muya rgyax moyay ga panga, panga iyu nya, theyaq ryaniq ca? hheyaq, theyaq ay, aki pisa tmucing?差不多san zi kang haw, akya maka kya ay, tyugan zikang ga? uya, tyugan tmucing, theyaq ga, kayal cikay musa su pnnuya tqenux ca nya maki nanu yaw? wahan lmamu lga, mabi kya lga, m'abi kya ro kmuya stake wahan kya tmuya tqenux la, mkiyay lga, mica krayun muyax la, mica qa besun la, ro nya maki rgyax ca nya maki nanu yaw ku? halu maki nanu yaw, nyan ta mtiyaw uyi, mabi kya ga, sngnwan utux uyi ga, sngungu utux nya uyi haw, tlamiy pkayan cikay utux ca, utux ga saliq ta ca ga ro tanux nya ga bras bras ma kucu nya bras bras a kman nya, kako nya wal mkangi ga, ro hlon hlon ma, hnuxun uyi ay, hlon hlon ma ga, inu knuxun ga? uka, qaca ga utux ga, maha kya ga, ro qutux he su nanaq musa rgyax? qutux cu nanaq he musa mabi rgayx ke, wal inu likuy su? hiya ga mpanga stake ro wahan nya mugi muyax hiya, ro babaw nya lga, aki hiya musa kmiya qa stake kya la, sngwan utux la, aki musa saying nabi ga, qutux calay nabi sngwan utux ro mgyas muyax hiya la, ro kingan musa mabi kya lga, nwah cu saying nabi kya, ro mehong nya lga, cwa su cimu ini pnnuya tqenux ca la? theyaq ciyan la, muya cami ramat lga, ini cami muya tqenux moyay ciyan la ga, muya ramat lga, blaq ramat cya ini koyay , garing pisa kawas ini su cimu muya tqenux la? pisa kawas la, talagay ryax la, aki payat mpux kawas la, aki zyozu neng ini cami kmuya laro, uya taryax la. ?
S.PHON: == mwani qalaŋ ro ʦ~ʨjan te inu ******* == qalaŋ βonβon ɣa, te tjuɣan qalaŋ maki mniβu,knβawiq nja ɣa aki maɣan kβħul meta, njux maki qs~ɕzjap na qalaŋ kβanun, mis~ɕuw qani ɣa, njux mqumaħ ramat ro alan naħa mʦ~ʨis~ɕal s~ɕquliq, nwaħan naħa mema ulaj ru mħkaŋi rɣjax, kruma ɣa mus~ɕa naħa ħalan mʔaβi te kintʔan . ʦ~ʨinllwan na qalaŋ βonβon qani ħija ɣa, puʦ~ʨiŋ nja ɣa s~ɕon naħa kn-βuŋ, imi qani ħija ɣa pzjux βalaj qs~ɕinux maħa ma, βaβaw nja lɣa, ijuɣun naħa lalu nja, s~ɕi s~ɕoj maħa βonβon la, ʦ~ʨjux maki ʦ~ʨjuɣan pinqijon na ʦ~ʨinllwan βonβon qani ħija, te qutux ɣa, minkaħul ijik na rħijal ma ɣa, mħtux qs~ɕja nja ɣa, βaq maki qutux ħŋijaŋ,te s~ɕaziŋ ɣa, rjax na kinlħaŋan na ɣipun ɣa, ʦ~ʨinlalu naħa ma. te ʦ~ʨjuɣan ɣa, mlaka ħziŋ ɣa, pali nja qpiraj ɣa βaq maki qutux ħŋijaŋ maħa ma, ana maħa kja ɣa βinaħ qalaŋ s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕijan naħa s~ɕon naħa kmal βonβon ru qalaŋ βonβon s~ɕquliq naħa ɣa s~ɕijon naħa kmal kn-βoŋ, mħa ni pqutaj naħa ʦ~ʨjux inu qalaŋ s~ɕu ini ɣa knaħul s~ɕu inu, βaq kmal kn-βuŋ naħa aj! pins~ɕβkan -ɣoɣan -qwilan ,ɣoɣan ,s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ,βaluŋ ,kuluʔ ,kβanun ,**(ʦ~ʨinaw),**(turuj)- kn-βoŋ -βonβon tajal qa njan qalaŋ βonβon,kn-βuŋ mwani **** qalaŋ βonβon s~ɕquliq naħa ɣa, aki ʦ~ʨjuɣan kβħul miman s~ɕquliq nja, aki ptnaq s~ɕuqliq naħa ki qalaŋ kβanun, s~ɕraral qani ħija ɣa maki pajat ini ptnaq qalaŋ mnwaħ ms~ɕqun te s~ɕani lro miʦ~ʨa ɣa ŋəjut maki qutux qalaŋ la. mis~ɕuw qani lɣa tjaβa qawas~ɕ kwara njux maki qalaŋ βonβon qani la, s~ɕenin naħa ɣa wal mtijaw ro wal mqwas~ɕ ħoɣan kwara la, miʦ~ʨa ɣa uŋat ħazi s~ɕenin ru mrkjas~ɕ kaki qalaŋ βonβon, βaβaw nja lɣa ŋəjut uŋat s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa mqumaħ la. mis~ɕuw qani qalaŋ βonβon ɣa, maki s~ɕajiŋ kkjokaj, qutux ɣa tens~ɕinkjo, ro te s~ɕajiŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjorokaj, nanu kwara nqu s~ɕnnjaħan nqu tajal ɣa, mtnaq nqu i s~ɕnħjun nħa, ana ɣa s~ɕkura s~ɕqu qalaŋ tajal maħa, s~ɕnħjan qu i tajal qani ɣa, kaħul s~ɕqu inluŋan naħa, aki s~ɕmru nqu inluŋan, ro s~ɕkura nqu i qlħan naħa, pis~ɕan ʦ~ʨqani ɣa, aki maki nqu i anzin nqu i inβlaq nqu qnxan nqu qjanux nqu tajal. qalaŋ βonβon qani ħija ɣa,mis~ɕuw qani ɣa njux naħa pmijon ɣa, tmana ini ɣa tβiħi ro nexi, mis~ɕuw qani lɣa njux i alan ʦ~ʨis~ɕal kaħat la, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj s~ɕquliq nwaħan s~ɕqani mʦ~ʨis~ɕal ulaj ru mħkaŋi tuqij na s~ɕraral, miʦ~ʨa ɣa ŋəjut mħtux s~ɕħoβaj ini ɣa tβes~ɕun nniqun ɣa. . rrjaniq qalaŋ **** kaħul ɣiran s~ɕkura mniβu, ɣlux te pitu ʦ~ʨja s~ɕeŋ s~ɕi s~ɕħouju mus~ɕa , s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa, akaj qutux tmuʦ~ʨiŋ, ro mus~ɕa s~ɕu ktalan kja qutux βniru qalaŋ βonβon, ini βs~ɕjaq lɣa teħok s~ɕu qalaŋ βonβon lɣa s~ɕi . *.ħnkijan ħnkijan rjaniq qnni ɣa,rjaniq ipun ʦ~ʨjuŋa qani, ħariŋ tojeŋ mnwaħ s~ɕki qalaŋ βonβon (ħiraŋ s~ɕeŋ s~ɕans~ɕe)qani ɣa, klaŋan ipun ɣa, rjaniq qani ɣa knβlaj ipun ʦ~ʨjuŋa, s~ɕenin tajal ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa, mwaħ mʦ~ʨiriq naħa ki kens~ɕat na ipun, meħoŋ nja lɣa, ħetaj na ipun nwaħ miŋat rɣjax βonβon qani, aki s~ɕmoja qapun s~ɕqa knβawiq qutux s~ɕeŋ mpitu kβħul meta rɣajx qani, pʦ~ʨiriq naħa ki s~ɕenin tajal ru pijux wal mnuqil ħetaj ni ipun ru s~ɕenin tajal, qani ɣa s~ɕi s~ɕaj maħa wa ta puŋan ta ijaw na rɣjax βonβon. ħariŋ qalaŋ βonβon mus~ɕa ulaj qani ɣa,aki mpux zikaŋ ʦ~ʨalaj, teħok qa ulaj na βonβon lɣa, maki liŋaj nja βaqun ktajux ms~ɕjakin na rɣjax ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj patas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjux maki rs~ɕnat nja, βlaq ktalan ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq knaħul tħejaq mnwaħ s~ɕqani s~ɕmoja ktajux rs~ɕnat qani.maki uzi kkman na mħeβuŋ ʦ~ʨjux mtrŋil rs~ɕnat qas~ɕa ru naħa kmal maħa jan ħazi knβlaj na qβa utux. *.**** ***tomi pas~ɕaŋ ****: s~ɕkajal ʦ~ʨikaj jaw na pinnuja s~ɕu tqenux ʦ~ʨjuŋa? s~ɕon nanu kmajal la, ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa kmut qħoniq ro puɣan na kikaj ro miʦ~ʨa qa βaqun muja iju la, iju na s~ɕtake, ro ħariŋ knwan pinnuja ʦ~ʨimu tqenux? βs~ɕjaq la, aki pis~ɕa kawas~ɕ la, aki zjozju neŋ malax ta la, aki tɣariŋ miman kawas~ɕ ħaji la ħaw ɣa? muja ta s~ɕtake ɣa? aki ɣariŋ maħa kja ħaji la, ro s~ɕon s~ɕu ʦ~ʨimu maħa nanu pnuja? puɣan kikaj ro miʦ~ʨa qa s~ɕjan iju nja la, miʦ~ʨa qa mwaħ tqenux nja laɣa, mqwalax ɣa waħan tmakuj qa βaluŋ ɣa, ro waħan ʦ~ʨqrux loji, ro miʦ~ʨa qa ʦ~ʨiŋun na qħoniq qa βaluŋ, miʦ~ʨa qa ħβku s~ɕtake nja, ro pis~ɕa llamu wal ʦ~ʨimu pnnuja tqenux qaʦ~ʨa? pis~ɕa s~ɕi ta s~ɕaj nanu wa ta qmijun joɣis~ɕe ro nanu la? qħoniq ɣa ini s~ɕi kmijaj qaβax ɣa, ktalan qa kmijan s~ɕu s~ɕtake ɣa qaʦ~ʨa qa tqujun ro tqujun laro ħeran loji, ro puɣan loji miʦ~ʨa kmijan s~ɕtake la, miʦ~ʨa kmijan iju lɣa, iju nja, ro ħlaβaŋ roq wal ʦ~ʨimu (pinnuja)? ini ħlaβaŋ, ʦ~ʨimaŋ* ro ʦ~ʨja maki inu roq ʦ~ʨa? tħejaq ʦ~ʨja maki rɣjax, ʦ~ʨjan maki lalu ku? rɣajx ʦ~ʨa? ʦ~ʨqjus~ɕ lalu nja, ro qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa? ini ptnaq ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa, maki kja qa nuluw ni mlikuj mjan ɣa, miʦ~ʨa qaʦ~ʨa ħalan naħa maquj, ro miʦ~ʨa ħalan kmuja, ijat qaβax qalaŋ aj, ħan, ima roq ʦ~ʨa? ijat roq ni ʦ~ʨquliq qaʦ~ʨa, roq na rinʦ~ʨjok qaʦ~ʨa, ro ima nja tqβaq ʦ~ʨimu muja? kaħat qa ps~ɕβaq ʦ~ʨami ɣa, kaħat qa mwaħ s~ɕmes~ɕ iju, ro miʦ~ʨa kβaqun mjan maħa s~ɕon nanu mus~ɕa muja ɣa, ini ta kβaqi uji qenu qħoniq uji ħaw, ro pnuja s~ɕu tqenux ʦ~ʨa nja maki nanu **(kinβaqan) nja ku? uka ħaw, s~ɕi puɣij laro, s~ɕi kmijaj lɣa, uja pquħan ro, miʦ~ʨa kmijan la, ro βlaq neraŋ nja? maki kβlaq uji, maki mquʦ~ʨiħ uji, uja ħopa pila ʦ~ʨjuŋa uji, maki qa mquʦ~ʨi iju nja ɣa, ini kpijux mwaħ uji, βlaq iju nja ɣa, miʦ~ʨa qa pijux mwaħ uji ɣa, ʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨimu βaq pnnuja tqenux? maki qa ps~ɕβaq qa ʦ~ʨami puŋan mjan ɣa, maki puŋan mu ʦ~ʨquliq ro miʦ~ʨa qa βaq ʦ~ʨami muja, ɣa ijat ɣa? ijat ta puŋan ta ke ħoɣal qs~ɕux uji ħaw, ħoɣal qs~ɕux muja ɣa, tajal qs~ɕux muja qa ħoɣal ɣa, ro puŋan mjan maħa ʦ~ʨjan muja s~ɕtake, miʦ~ʨa qa βaq ʦ~ʨami muja uji la, ro pnnuja qa tqenux mojaj ku? mojaj ħaw, tkujun qħoniq ro ħħeran ro puɣan ro muja kneril ɣa, paŋa iju mus~ɕa mujax, ɣariŋ mujax paŋa iju ro waħan muja rɣjax mojaj ɣa paŋa, paŋa iju nja, tħejaq rjaniq ʦ~ʨa? ħħejaq, tħejaq aj, aki pis~ɕa tmuʦ~ʨiŋ?***s~ɕan zi kaŋ ħaw, akja maka kja aj, tjuɣan zikaŋ ɣa? uja, tjuɣan tmuʦ~ʨiŋ, tħejaq ɣa, kajal ʦ~ʨikaj mus~ɕa s~ɕu pnnuja tqenux ʦ~ʨa nja maki nanu jaw? waħan lmamu lɣa, maβi kja lɣa, mʔaβi kja ro kmuja s~ɕtake waħan kja tmuja tqenux la, mkijaj lɣa, miʦ~ʨa krajun mujax la, miʦ~ʨa qa βes~ɕun la, ro nja maki rɣjax ʦ~ʨa nja maki nanu jaw ku? ħalu maki nanu jaw, njan ta mtijaw uji, maβi kja ɣa, s~ɕŋnwan utux uji ɣa, s~ɕŋuŋu utux nja uji ħaw, tlamij pkajan ʦ~ʨikaj utux ʦ~ʨa, utux ɣa s~ɕaliq ta ʦ~ʨa ɣa ro tanux nja ɣa βras~ɕ βras~ɕ ma kuʦ~ʨu nja βras~ɕ βras~ɕ a kman nja, kako nja wal mkaŋi ɣa, ro ħlon ħlon ma, ħnuxun uji aj, ħlon ħlon ma ɣa, inu knuxun ɣa? uka, qaʦ~ʨa ɣa utux ɣa, maħa kja ɣa, ro qutux ħe s~ɕu nanaq mus~ɕa rɣjax? qutux ʦ~ʨu nanaq ħe mus~ɕa maβi rɣajx ke, wal inu likuj s~ɕu? ħija ɣa mpaŋa s~ɕtake ro waħan nja muɣi mujax ħija, ro βaβaw nja lɣa, aki ħija mus~ɕa kmija qa s~ɕtake kja la, s~ɕŋwan utux la, aki mus~ɕa s~ɕajiŋ naβi ɣa, qutux ʦ~ʨalaj naβi s~ɕŋwan utux ro mɣjas~ɕ mujax ħija la, ro kiŋan mus~ɕa maβi kja lɣa, nwaħ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕajiŋ naβi kja, ro meħoŋ nja lɣa, ʦ~ʨwa s~ɕu ʦ~ʨimu ini pnnuja tqenux ʦ~ʨa la? tħejaq ʦ~ʨijan la, muja ʦ~ʨami ramat lɣa, ini ʦ~ʨami muja tqenux mojaj ʦ~ʨijan la ɣa, muja ramat lɣa, βlaq ramat ʦ~ʨja ini kojaj , ɣariŋ pis~ɕa kawas~ɕ ini s~ɕu ʦ~ʨimu muja tqenux la? pis~ɕa kawas~ɕ la, talaɣaj rjax la, aki pajat mpux kawas~ɕ la, aki zjozu neŋ ini ʦ~ʨami kmuja laro, uja tarjax la. ?
S.FORM: == mwani qalang ro cyan te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Bonbon ga, te tyugan qalang maki mnibu,knbawiq nya ga aki magan kbhul meta, nyux maki qszyap na qalang Kbanun, misuw qani ga, nyux mqumah ramat ro alan naha mcisal squliq, nwahan naha mema ulay ru mhkangi rgyax, kruma ga musa naha halan m'abi te kint'an . cinllwan na qalang Bonbon qani hiya ga, pucing nya ga son naha Kn-bung, imi qani hiya ga pzyux balay qsinux maha ma, babaw nya lga, iyugun naha lalu nya, si soy maha bonbon la, cyux maki cyugan pinqiyon na cinllwan Bonbon qani hiya, te qutux ga, minkahul iyik na rhiyal ma ga, mhtux qsya nya ga, baq maki qutux hngiyang,te sazing ga, ryax na kinlhangan na Gipun ga, cinlalu naha ma. te cyugan ga, mlaka hzing ga, pali nya qpiray ga baq maki qutux hngiyang maha ma, ana maha kya ga binah qalang squliq ga siyan naha son naha kmal Bonbon ru qalang Bonbon squliq naha ga siyon naha kmal Kn-bong, mha ni pqutay naha cyux inu qalang su ini ga knahul su inu, baq kmal Kn-bung naha ay! Pinsbkan -Gogan -Qwilan ,Gogan ,Saruc ,Balung ,Kulu' ,Kbanun ,智腦(cinaw),東壘(turuy)- kn-bong -Bonbon tayal qa nyan qalang Bonbon,Kn-bung mwani 人口概況 qalang Bonbon squliq naha ga, aki cyugan kbhul miman squliq nya, aki ptnaq suqliq naha ki qalang Kbanun, sraral qani hiya ga maki payat ini ptnaq qalang mnwah msqun te sani lro mica ga ng_yut maki qutux qalang la. misuw qani lga tyaba qawas kwara nyux maki qalang Bonbon qani la, senin naha ga wal mtiyaw ro wal mqwas hogan kwara la, mica ga ungat hazi senin ru mrkyas kaki qalang Bonbon, babaw nya lga ng_yut ungat squliq musa mqumah la. misuw qani qalang Bonbon ga, maki saying kkyokay, qutux ga Tensinkyo, ro te saying ga Cyorokay, nanu kwara nqu snnyahan nqu Tayal ga, mtnaq nqu i snhyun nha, ana ga skura squ qalang Tayal maha, snhyan qu i Tayal qani ga, kahul squ inlungan naha, aki smru nqu inlungan, ro skura nqu i qlhan naha, pisan cqani ga, aki maki nqu i anzin nqu i inblaq nqu qnxan nqu qyanux nqu Tayal. qalang Bonbon qani hiya ga,misuw qani ga nyux naha pmiyon ga, tmana ini ga tbihi ro nexi, misuw qani lga nyux i alan cisal kahat la, cingay balay squliq nwahan sqani mcisal ulay ru mhkangi tuqiy na sraral, mica ga ng_yut mhtux shobay ini ga tbesun nniqun ga. . rryaniq qalang 部落交通 kahul Giran skura Mnibu, glux te pitu cya seng si shouyu musa , shoyu musa, akay qutux tmucing, ro musa su ktalan kya qutux bniru qalang Bonbon, ini bsyaq lga tehok su qalang Bonbon lga si . 1.Hnkiyan Hnkiyan ryaniq qnni ga,ryaniq Ipun cyunga qani, haring Toyeng mnwah ski qalang Bonbon (Hirang seng Sanse)qani ga, klangan Ipun ga, ryaniq qani ga knblay Ipun cyunga, senin Tayal cyunga ga, mwah mciriq naha ki kensat na Ipun, mehong nya lga, hetay na Ipun nwah mingat rgyax Bonbon qani, aki smoya qapun sqa knbawiq qutux seng mpitu kbhul meta rgayx qani, pciriq naha ki senin Tayal ru piyux wal mnuqil hetay ni Ipun ru senin Tayal, qani ga si say maha wa ta pungan ta iyaw na rgyax Bonbon. haring qalang Bonbon musa ulay qani ga,aki mpux zikang calay, tehok qa ulay na Bonbon lga, maki lingay nya baqun ktayux msyakin na rgyax ru cingay balay patas cyux maki rsnat nya, blaq ktalan ru cingay squliq knahul theyaq mnwah sqani smoya ktayux rsnat qani.maki uzi kkman na mhebung cyux mtrngil rsnat qasa ru naha kmal maha yan hazi knblay na qba Utux. 2.芃芃溫泉 以下為Tomi Pasang 訪談內容: skayal cikay yaw na pinnuya su tqenux cyunga? son nanu kmayal la, cyunga ga kmut qhoniq ro pugan na kikay ro mica qa baqun muya iyu la, iyu na stake, ro haring knwan pinnuya cimu tqenux? bsyaq la, aki pisa kawas la, aki zyozyu neng malax ta la, aki tgaring miman kawas hayi la haw ga? muya ta stake ga? aki garing maha kya hayi la, ro son su cimu maha nanu pnuya? pugan kikay ro mica qa syan iyu nya la, mica qa mwah tqenux nya laga, mqwalax ga wahan tmakuy qa balung ga, ro wahan cqrux loyi, ro mica qa cingun na qhoniq qa balung, mica qa hbku stake nya, ro pisa llamu wal cimu pnnuya tqenux qaca? pisa si ta say nanu wa ta qmiyun yogise ro nanu la? qhoniq ga ini si kmiyay qabax ga, ktalan qa kmiyan su stake ga qaca qa tquyun ro tquyun laro heran loyi, ro pugan loyi mica kmiyan stake la, mica kmiyan iyu lga, iyu nya, ro hlabang roq wal cimu (pinnuya)? ini hlabang, cimang… ro cya maki inu roq ca? theyaq cya maki rgyax, cyan maki lalu ku? rgayx ca? Cqyus lalu nya, ro qabax cquliq musa? ini ptnaq cquliq ga, maki kya qa nuluw ni mlikuy myan ga, mica qaca halan naha maquy, ro mica halan kmuya, iyat qabax qalang ay, han, ima roq ca? iyat roq ni cquliq qaca, roq na rincyok qaca, ro ima nya tqbaq cimu muya? kahat qa psbaq cami ga, kahat qa mwah smes iyu, ro mica kbaqun myan maha son nanu musa muya ga, ini ta kbaqi uyi qenu qhoniq uyi haw, ro pnuya su tqenux ca nya maki nanu 技巧(kinbaqan) nya ku? uka haw, si pugiy laro, si kmiyay lga, uya pquhan ro, mica kmiyan la, ro blaq nerang nya? maki kblaq uyi, maki mqucih uyi, uya hopa pila cyunga uyi, maki qa mquci iyu nya ga, ini kpiyux mwah uyi, blaq iyu nya ga, mica qa piyux mwah uyi ga, cwa cimu baq pnnuya tqenux? maki qa psbaq qa cami pungan myan ga, maki pungan mu cquliq ro mica qa baq cami muya, ga iyat ga? iyat ta pungan ta ke hogal qsux uyi haw, hogal qsux muya ga, Tayal qsux muya qa hogal ga, ro pungan myan maha cyan muya stake, mica qa baq cami muya uyi la, ro pnnuya qa tqenux moyay ku? moyay haw, tkuyun qhoniq ro hheran ro pugan ro muya kneril ga, panga iyu musa muyax, garing muyax panga iyu ro wahan muya rgyax moyay ga panga, panga iyu nya, theyaq ryaniq ca? hheyaq, theyaq ay, aki pisa tmucing?差不多san zi kang haw, akya maka kya ay, tyugan zikang ga? uya, tyugan tmucing, theyaq ga, kayal cikay musa su pnnuya tqenux ca nya maki nanu yaw? wahan lmamu lga, mabi kya lga, m'abi kya ro kmuya stake wahan kya tmuya tqenux la, mkiyay lga, mica krayun muyax la, mica qa besun la, ro nya maki rgyax ca nya maki nanu yaw ku? halu maki nanu yaw, nyan ta mtiyaw uyi, mabi kya ga, sngnwan utux uyi ga, sngungu utux nya uyi haw, tlamiy pkayan cikay utux ca, utux ga saliq ta ca ga ro tanux nya ga bras bras ma kucu nya bras bras a kman nya, kako nya wal mkangi ga, ro hlon hlon ma, hnuxun uyi ay, hlon hlon ma ga, inu knuxun ga? uka, qaca ga utux ga, maha kya ga, ro qutux he su nanaq musa rgyax? qutux cu nanaq he musa mabi rgayx ke, wal inu likuy su? hiya ga mpanga stake ro wahan nya mugi muyax hiya, ro babaw nya lga, aki hiya musa kmiya qa stake kya la, sngwan utux la, aki musa saying nabi ga, qutux calay nabi sngwan utux ro mgyas muyax hiya la, ro kingan musa mabi kya lga, nwah cu saying nabi kya, ro mehong nya lga, cwa su cimu ini pnnuya tqenux ca la? theyaq ciyan la, muya cami ramat lga, ini cami muya tqenux moyay ciyan la ga, muya ramat lga, blaq ramat cya ini koyay , garing pisa kawas ini su cimu muya tqenux la? pisa kawas la, talagay ryax la, aki payat mpux kawas la, aki zyozu neng ini cami kmuya laro, uya taryax la. ?
S.PHON: == mwani qalaŋ ro ʦ~ʨjan te inu ******* == qalaŋ βonβon ɣa, te tjuɣan qalaŋ maki mniβu,knβawiq nja ɣa aki maɣan kβħul meta, njux maki qs~ɕzjap na qalaŋ kβanun, mis~ɕuw qani ɣa, njux mqumaħ ramat ro alan naħa mʦ~ʨis~ɕal s~ɕquliq, nwaħan naħa mema ulaj ru mħkaŋi rɣjax, kruma ɣa mus~ɕa naħa ħalan mʔaβi te kintʔan . ʦ~ʨinllwan na qalaŋ βonβon qani ħija ɣa, puʦ~ʨiŋ nja ɣa s~ɕon naħa kn-βuŋ, imi qani ħija ɣa pzjux βalaj qs~ɕinux maħa ma, βaβaw nja lɣa, ijuɣun naħa lalu nja, s~ɕi s~ɕoj maħa βonβon la, ʦ~ʨjux maki ʦ~ʨjuɣan pinqijon na ʦ~ʨinllwan βonβon qani ħija, te qutux ɣa, minkaħul ijik na rħijal ma ɣa, mħtux qs~ɕja nja ɣa, βaq maki qutux ħŋijaŋ,te s~ɕaziŋ ɣa, rjax na kinlħaŋan na ɣipun ɣa, ʦ~ʨinlalu naħa ma. te ʦ~ʨjuɣan ɣa, mlaka ħziŋ ɣa, pali nja qpiraj ɣa βaq maki qutux ħŋijaŋ maħa ma, ana maħa kja ɣa βinaħ qalaŋ s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕijan naħa s~ɕon naħa kmal βonβon ru qalaŋ βonβon s~ɕquliq naħa ɣa s~ɕijon naħa kmal kn-βoŋ, mħa ni pqutaj naħa ʦ~ʨjux inu qalaŋ s~ɕu ini ɣa knaħul s~ɕu inu, βaq kmal kn-βuŋ naħa aj! pins~ɕβkan -ɣoɣan -qwilan ,ɣoɣan ,s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ,βaluŋ ,kuluʔ ,kβanun ,**(ʦ~ʨinaw),**(turuj)- kn-βoŋ -βonβon tajal qa njan qalaŋ βonβon,kn-βuŋ mwani **** qalaŋ βonβon s~ɕquliq naħa ɣa, aki ʦ~ʨjuɣan kβħul miman s~ɕquliq nja, aki ptnaq s~ɕuqliq naħa ki qalaŋ kβanun, s~ɕraral qani ħija ɣa maki pajat ini ptnaq qalaŋ mnwaħ ms~ɕqun te s~ɕani lro miʦ~ʨa ɣa ŋəjut maki qutux qalaŋ la. mis~ɕuw qani lɣa tjaβa qawas~ɕ kwara njux maki qalaŋ βonβon qani la, s~ɕenin naħa ɣa wal mtijaw ro wal mqwas~ɕ ħoɣan kwara la, miʦ~ʨa ɣa uŋat ħazi s~ɕenin ru mrkjas~ɕ kaki qalaŋ βonβon, βaβaw nja lɣa ŋəjut uŋat s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa mqumaħ la. mis~ɕuw qani qalaŋ βonβon ɣa, maki s~ɕajiŋ kkjokaj, qutux ɣa tens~ɕinkjo, ro te s~ɕajiŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjorokaj, nanu kwara nqu s~ɕnnjaħan nqu tajal ɣa, mtnaq nqu i s~ɕnħjun nħa, ana ɣa s~ɕkura s~ɕqu qalaŋ tajal maħa, s~ɕnħjan qu i tajal qani ɣa, kaħul s~ɕqu inluŋan naħa, aki s~ɕmru nqu inluŋan, ro s~ɕkura nqu i qlħan naħa, pis~ɕan ʦ~ʨqani ɣa, aki maki nqu i anzin nqu i inβlaq nqu qnxan nqu qjanux nqu tajal. qalaŋ βonβon qani ħija ɣa,mis~ɕuw qani ɣa njux naħa pmijon ɣa, tmana ini ɣa tβiħi ro nexi, mis~ɕuw qani lɣa njux i alan ʦ~ʨis~ɕal kaħat la, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj s~ɕquliq nwaħan s~ɕqani mʦ~ʨis~ɕal ulaj ru mħkaŋi tuqij na s~ɕraral, miʦ~ʨa ɣa ŋəjut mħtux s~ɕħoβaj ini ɣa tβes~ɕun nniqun ɣa. . rrjaniq qalaŋ **** kaħul ɣiran s~ɕkura mniβu, ɣlux te pitu ʦ~ʨja s~ɕeŋ s~ɕi s~ɕħouju mus~ɕa , s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa, akaj qutux tmuʦ~ʨiŋ, ro mus~ɕa s~ɕu ktalan kja qutux βniru qalaŋ βonβon, ini βs~ɕjaq lɣa teħok s~ɕu qalaŋ βonβon lɣa s~ɕi . *.ħnkijan ħnkijan rjaniq qnni ɣa,rjaniq ipun ʦ~ʨjuŋa qani, ħariŋ tojeŋ mnwaħ s~ɕki qalaŋ βonβon (ħiraŋ s~ɕeŋ s~ɕans~ɕe)qani ɣa, klaŋan ipun ɣa, rjaniq qani ɣa knβlaj ipun ʦ~ʨjuŋa, s~ɕenin tajal ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa, mwaħ mʦ~ʨiriq naħa ki kens~ɕat na ipun, meħoŋ nja lɣa, ħetaj na ipun nwaħ miŋat rɣjax βonβon qani, aki s~ɕmoja qapun s~ɕqa knβawiq qutux s~ɕeŋ mpitu kβħul meta rɣajx qani, pʦ~ʨiriq naħa ki s~ɕenin tajal ru pijux wal mnuqil ħetaj ni ipun ru s~ɕenin tajal, qani ɣa s~ɕi s~ɕaj maħa wa ta puŋan ta ijaw na rɣjax βonβon. ħariŋ qalaŋ βonβon mus~ɕa ulaj qani ɣa,aki mpux zikaŋ ʦ~ʨalaj, teħok qa ulaj na βonβon lɣa, maki liŋaj nja βaqun ktajux ms~ɕjakin na rɣjax ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj patas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjux maki rs~ɕnat nja, βlaq ktalan ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq knaħul tħejaq mnwaħ s~ɕqani s~ɕmoja ktajux rs~ɕnat qani.maki uzi kkman na mħeβuŋ ʦ~ʨjux mtrŋil rs~ɕnat qas~ɕa ru naħa kmal maħa jan ħazi knβlaj na qβa utux. *.**** ***tomi pas~ɕaŋ ****: s~ɕkajal ʦ~ʨikaj jaw na pinnuja s~ɕu tqenux ʦ~ʨjuŋa? s~ɕon nanu kmajal la, ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa kmut qħoniq ro puɣan na kikaj ro miʦ~ʨa qa βaqun muja iju la, iju na s~ɕtake, ro ħariŋ knwan pinnuja ʦ~ʨimu tqenux? βs~ɕjaq la, aki pis~ɕa kawas~ɕ la, aki zjozju neŋ malax ta la, aki tɣariŋ miman kawas~ɕ ħaji la ħaw ɣa? muja ta s~ɕtake ɣa? aki ɣariŋ maħa kja ħaji la, ro s~ɕon s~ɕu ʦ~ʨimu maħa nanu pnuja? puɣan kikaj ro miʦ~ʨa qa s~ɕjan iju nja la, miʦ~ʨa qa mwaħ tqenux nja laɣa, mqwalax ɣa waħan tmakuj qa βaluŋ ɣa, ro waħan ʦ~ʨqrux loji, ro miʦ~ʨa qa ʦ~ʨiŋun na qħoniq qa βaluŋ, miʦ~ʨa qa ħβku s~ɕtake nja, ro pis~ɕa llamu wal ʦ~ʨimu pnnuja tqenux qaʦ~ʨa? pis~ɕa s~ɕi ta s~ɕaj nanu wa ta qmijun joɣis~ɕe ro nanu la? qħoniq ɣa ini s~ɕi kmijaj qaβax ɣa, ktalan qa kmijan s~ɕu s~ɕtake ɣa qaʦ~ʨa qa tqujun ro tqujun laro ħeran loji, ro puɣan loji miʦ~ʨa kmijan s~ɕtake la, miʦ~ʨa kmijan iju lɣa, iju nja, ro ħlaβaŋ roq wal ʦ~ʨimu (pinnuja)? ini ħlaβaŋ, ʦ~ʨimaŋ* ro ʦ~ʨja maki inu roq ʦ~ʨa? tħejaq ʦ~ʨja maki rɣjax, ʦ~ʨjan maki lalu ku? rɣajx ʦ~ʨa? ʦ~ʨqjus~ɕ lalu nja, ro qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa? ini ptnaq ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa, maki kja qa nuluw ni mlikuj mjan ɣa, miʦ~ʨa qaʦ~ʨa ħalan naħa maquj, ro miʦ~ʨa ħalan kmuja, ijat qaβax qalaŋ aj, ħan, ima roq ʦ~ʨa? ijat roq ni ʦ~ʨquliq qaʦ~ʨa, roq na rinʦ~ʨjok qaʦ~ʨa, ro ima nja tqβaq ʦ~ʨimu muja? kaħat qa ps~ɕβaq ʦ~ʨami ɣa, kaħat qa mwaħ s~ɕmes~ɕ iju, ro miʦ~ʨa kβaqun mjan maħa s~ɕon nanu mus~ɕa muja ɣa, ini ta kβaqi uji qenu qħoniq uji ħaw, ro pnuja s~ɕu tqenux ʦ~ʨa nja maki nanu **(kinβaqan) nja ku? uka ħaw, s~ɕi puɣij laro, s~ɕi kmijaj lɣa, uja pquħan ro, miʦ~ʨa kmijan la, ro βlaq neraŋ nja? maki kβlaq uji, maki mquʦ~ʨiħ uji, uja ħopa pila ʦ~ʨjuŋa uji, maki qa mquʦ~ʨi iju nja ɣa, ini kpijux mwaħ uji, βlaq iju nja ɣa, miʦ~ʨa qa pijux mwaħ uji ɣa, ʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨimu βaq pnnuja tqenux? maki qa ps~ɕβaq qa ʦ~ʨami puŋan mjan ɣa, maki puŋan mu ʦ~ʨquliq ro miʦ~ʨa qa βaq ʦ~ʨami muja, ɣa ijat ɣa? ijat ta puŋan ta ke ħoɣal qs~ɕux uji ħaw, ħoɣal qs~ɕux muja ɣa, tajal qs~ɕux muja qa ħoɣal ɣa, ro puŋan mjan maħa ʦ~ʨjan muja s~ɕtake, miʦ~ʨa qa βaq ʦ~ʨami muja uji la, ro pnnuja qa tqenux mojaj ku? mojaj ħaw, tkujun qħoniq ro ħħeran ro puɣan ro muja kneril ɣa, paŋa iju mus~ɕa mujax, ɣariŋ mujax paŋa iju ro waħan muja rɣjax mojaj ɣa paŋa, paŋa iju nja, tħejaq rjaniq ʦ~ʨa? ħħejaq, tħejaq aj, aki pis~ɕa tmuʦ~ʨiŋ?***s~ɕan zi kaŋ ħaw, akja maka kja aj, tjuɣan zikaŋ ɣa? uja, tjuɣan tmuʦ~ʨiŋ, tħejaq ɣa, kajal ʦ~ʨikaj mus~ɕa s~ɕu pnnuja tqenux ʦ~ʨa nja maki nanu jaw? waħan lmamu lɣa, maβi kja lɣa, mʔaβi kja ro kmuja s~ɕtake waħan kja tmuja tqenux la, mkijaj lɣa, miʦ~ʨa krajun mujax la, miʦ~ʨa qa βes~ɕun la, ro nja maki rɣjax ʦ~ʨa nja maki nanu jaw ku? ħalu maki nanu jaw, njan ta mtijaw uji, maβi kja ɣa, s~ɕŋnwan utux uji ɣa, s~ɕŋuŋu utux nja uji ħaw, tlamij pkajan ʦ~ʨikaj utux ʦ~ʨa, utux ɣa s~ɕaliq ta ʦ~ʨa ɣa ro tanux nja ɣa βras~ɕ βras~ɕ ma kuʦ~ʨu nja βras~ɕ βras~ɕ a kman nja, kako nja wal mkaŋi ɣa, ro ħlon ħlon ma, ħnuxun uji aj, ħlon ħlon ma ɣa, inu knuxun ɣa? uka, qaʦ~ʨa ɣa utux ɣa, maħa kja ɣa, ro qutux ħe s~ɕu nanaq mus~ɕa rɣjax? qutux ʦ~ʨu nanaq ħe mus~ɕa maβi rɣajx ke, wal inu likuj s~ɕu? ħija ɣa mpaŋa s~ɕtake ro waħan nja muɣi mujax ħija, ro βaβaw nja lɣa, aki ħija mus~ɕa kmija qa s~ɕtake kja la, s~ɕŋwan utux la, aki mus~ɕa s~ɕajiŋ naβi ɣa, qutux ʦ~ʨalaj naβi s~ɕŋwan utux ro mɣjas~ɕ mujax ħija la, ro kiŋan mus~ɕa maβi kja lɣa, nwaħ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕajiŋ naβi kja, ro meħoŋ nja lɣa, ʦ~ʨwa s~ɕu ʦ~ʨimu ini pnnuja tqenux ʦ~ʨa la? tħejaq ʦ~ʨijan la, muja ʦ~ʨami ramat lɣa, ini ʦ~ʨami muja tqenux mojaj ʦ~ʨijan la ɣa, muja ramat lɣa, βlaq ramat ʦ~ʨja ini kojaj , ɣariŋ pis~ɕa kawas~ɕ ini s~ɕu ʦ~ʨimu muja tqenux la? pis~ɕa kawas~ɕ la, talaɣaj rjax la, aki pajat mpux kawas~ɕ la, aki zjozu neŋ ini ʦ~ʨami kmuja laro, uja tarjax la. ?
